model.name: Krea 2 RAW Identity Edit v1.2
model.description: Instruction-based image editing with identity preservation using Krea 2 RAW and the full-rank Identity Edit v1.2 LoRA. Up to 2 Reference Images are supported. Use the Raw Model if you are trying to remove People or Objects.

prompt: Change the car color to matte black and keep the camera angle and surroundings unchanged.
